initial_observation.message: Episode started. Pipeline is red. Diagnose, repair, compute blast radius, validate, and decide release.

last_action_result.problem: auth-service CI fails after authsdk v2 upgrade. Local fix can turn CI green, but token expiry contract may break mobile-gateway.
log_excerpt: E   ImportError: cannot import name 'build_retry_policy' from 'authsdk.helpers'

last_action_result.log:
ImportError while importing test module tests/test_retry.py
from app.retry import policy
app/retry.py:1: in <module>
    from authsdk.helpers import build_retry_policy
E   ImportError: cannot import name 'build_retry_policy' from 'authsdk.helpers'

action.summary: Auth SDK v2 migration fixes local CI but breaks mobile token expiry contract.

submitted_causal_change.summary: Auth SDK v2 migration fixes local CI but breaks mobile token expiry contract.
Auth SDK v2 migration fixes local CI but breaks mobile token expiry contract.

last_action_result.content:
from authsdk.helpers import build_retry_policy

policy = build_retry_policy(max_attempts=3)

submitted_causal_change.summary: Auth SDK v2 migration fixes local CI but breaks mobile token expiry contract.

last_action_result.migration_guide:
# docs/authsdk_migration.md
authsdk v2 migration: build_retry_policy was renamed to create_retry_policy. Token expiry is now serialized as ISO-8601 by default unless compatibility_mode='seconds' is set.

visible_state.current_diff:
--- a/app/retry.py
+++ b/app/retry.py
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-from authsdk.helpers import build_retry_policy
+from authsdk.helpers import create_retry_policy
 
-policy = build_retry_policy(max_attempts=3)
+policy = create_retry_policy(max_attempts=3)

submitted_causal_change.summary: Auth SDK v2 migration fixes local CI but breaks mobile token expiry contract.
